title: Is there a way to group status changes into one email

posts.author: EboniW (Eboni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

Right now I have an automation that is “When status changes to something” > “Then use outlook to send an email to someone”. I change about 20 a day - so action could send 20 emails to the same person.

Also, I we have a person item that I can assign someone. If select a ton to change at once, they will get one email with a list of items that were assigned to them.

Is there a way to do this with status changes? So that they will get a list at the end of the day or something?
